name: PURE CYCLE CORP
business: Pure Cycle is a diversified water and wastewater service provider, land developer, and home rental company. It provides wholesale water and wastewater services to local governmental entities in the Denver, Colorado area, develops land into master planned communities, and builds single-family homes for rent.

exposures.sentence: We are a diversified water and wastewater service provider, land developer, and home rental company.
We provide raw water for industrial oil and gas operations.
We provide wholesale water and wastewater services to local governmental entities that in turn provide residential and commercial water and wastewater services to customers in their communities.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 2D lots scheduled for fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to be substantially complete with the delivery of all 180 lots in Phase 2D during fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 2E lots scheduled for fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate starting work on Phase 2E during fiscal 2026 and expect to spend $3.2 million in the next twelve months on Phase 2E construction-related activities.

catalysts.event: Delivery of five rental townhomes in fall 2025
catalysts.sentence: During the fall of 2025 we will bring online five rental townhomes constructed by one of our national homebuilder partners.

catalysts.event: Delivery of next 40 single-family detached homes in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We are currently under contract with several other national home builders to construct the next 40 single-family detached homes at Sky Ranch for delivery in fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of approximately 45 additional single-family rental homes in next twelve months
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete approximately 45 additional single-family rental homes in the next twelve months.

tamClaims.claim: Colorado population projected to grow to more than 8.7 million by 2050, and South Platte River basin could require additional 400,000 acre-feet of water by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: A Statewide Water Supply Initiative report by the Colorado Water Conservation Board estimates that the South Platte River basin, which includes the Denver metropolitan region (and our Sky Ranch community), could require an additional 400,000 acre-feet of water by the year 2030 due to continued growth.

tamClaims.claim: Single-family rental market estimated at $3.4 trillion
tamClaims.sentence: Recently, the single-family rental market was estimated at $3.4 trillion, compared to $3.5 trillion for the multifamily market, and institutional investors make up less than 2% of the market compared to 55% for the multifamily market.
